title: Bridge Essay: Decoding the Narcissistic Brain.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Wind/Pride** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Wind and pride — ego, narcissism, social dominance, self-esteem, status, social hierarchy in neuroscience, self-enhancement, hubris.

**Decoding the Narcissistic Brain.** — Neuroimage. PMID: 40403942. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2025.121284. There is asubstantial knowledge gap in the narcissism literature: <1 % of the nearly 12,000 articles on narcissism have addressed its neural basis. To help fill this gap, we asked whether the multifacetedness of narcissism could be decoded from spontaneous neural oscillations. We attempted to do so by applying amachine learning approach (multivariate pattern analysis) to the resting-state EEG data of 162 participants who also completed acomprehensive battery of narcissism scales assessing age...
